block_00: The rising popularity of online trading
block_01: has its reasons. 2020 has been a year of major ups and downs for the market, which created several opportunities for alert traders that paid attention to the economic news. The extreme volatility may have even attracted those who had never thought about trading before.
block_02: Another factor that played into it was the forced self-isolation that left people with much more free time in order to consider learning about trading and investing. What may traders expect from online trading in the future?
